title: [Enhancement] Add self-trade prevention (STP)
body:
## Problem

The engine has no concept of order ownership (user/account). This means a single participant can match against their own orders, which is known as a "self-trade" or "wash trade."

Self-trading is prohibited on most regulated exchanges and can be used for market manipulation (inflating volume).

## Proposed Solution

Add an `OwnerID` field to the `Order` struct:

```go
type Order struct {
    ID        string
    OwnerID   string  // new: identifies the trader
    Side      Side
    // ...
}
```

During matching, skip or cancel orders from the same owner. Common STP modes:

| Mode | Behavior |
|------|----------|
| Cancel Resting | Cancel the resting order, continue matching |
| Cancel Incoming | Cancel the incoming order entirely |
| Cancel Both | Cancel both orders |
| Decrement | Reduce both by the overlap quantity |

The mode could be configurable per engine or per order.

## Priority
Medium — important for any multi-user deployment.
